title: Adding to the automation threads found this simple no code pattern scanner for quick crypto checks
author: ChartSage
selftext:
Hey r/ai_trading,

Loving the recent chats on automating parts of trading (like the Has anyone else automated? post with good discussion on bots vs. manual) and building AI scanners the momentum sheets and cycle signals are cool too.

For someone who wants fast pattern spotting without full custom coding or heavy AI overhead (especially in choppy markets like now with BTC/ETH ranging and alts testing supports), I was looking for something lightweight.

Came across this straightforward webapp called ChartScout it pulls live data from exchanges (Binance/Bybit/etc.), and just flags basic patterns quick (flags, wedges, channels, double bottoms/tops, etc.) with zero clutter or subscriptions needed for basics. No fancy ML predictions more like a fast filter to narrow watchlists so I can dive deeper only on promising ones.

Been using it casually the last week and it's cut down screen time nicely during consolidations.

What about you all  how are you mixing AI/tools for pattern detection? Full custom bots, Google Sheets setups, or lighter scanners? Any favorites for crypto volatility right now? Let's share always good to hear what works!

comments.author: robert_lewis_12
comments.body: The UI looks clean, but the real test for these scanners is always repainting. Does it alert you as the pattern is forming (which often leads to false signals), or only after the candle closes?
